data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. NEVER ORDINARY has recorded back-to-back wins including last time out over 1050m in the LR Dequetteville Stakes at this track when sent out as the hot favourite. Trained here and jumping from an inside draw should be carrying on her winning way. 1. OLE GO led all the way to score as the favourite on debut over 1050m at this track last start. Has since won a four-runner trial over 1050m at Morphettville Parks and can make it back-to-back wins. 8. VERZAIN showed good early speed at the first run after a spell last time out and led for most of the way before getting outrun late, finishing second of 10 over 1050m in the LR Dequetteville Stakes at this track. She jumps from the inside draw and can go back-to-back. 9. LAGUNANINI was safely held last start when finishing 10th of 12 at Caulfield. Has claims if she can reproduce her win at Sale two starts back. Rates well as a main danger.","runners":[7,1,8,9],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: MORPHETTVILLE-R4-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
